symptom: sudden face drooping facial numbness weakness on one side of face
notes: Unilateral facial droop — stroke warning sign

symptom: sudden arm or leg weakness numbness especially on one side of body
sudden confusion trouble speaking difficulty understanding speech
sudden trouble seeing in one or both eyes, vision loss
notes: Sudden visual disturbance — stroke or TIA

symptom: sudden trouble walking dizziness loss of balance loss of coordination
notes: Acute ataxia and balance loss — posterior stroke

symptom: sudden severe headache with no known cause thunderclap
severe abdominal pain after trauma accident or injury to abdomen
severe abdominal pain with chest pressure or chest pain
notes: Abdominal pain + chest pressure — aortic dissection

symptom: abdominal pain with black tarry stool bloody stool vomiting blood
notes: GI bleed signs — hematemesis or melena

symptom: abdominal pain with swollen and tender abdomen, distension
notes: Tender distended abdomen — obstruction or peritonitis

symptom: abdominal pain with high fever or persistent vomiting for hours
notes: Fever + abdominal pain — possible peritonitis or abscess

symptom: chest pain or upper abdominal pressure lasting two minutes or more
chest pain with nausea sweating dizziness or shortness of breath
difficulty breathing or shortness of breath at rest, severe dyspnea
fainting sudden dizziness sudden weakness difficulty waking up
notes: Syncope or altered consciousness — cardiac or neuro

symptom: difficult or painful breathing with chest pain or chest tightness
notes: Pleuritic chest pain + dyspnea — possible PE

symptom: coughing bloody sputum with fast heartbeat or lightheadedness hemoptysis
arm or leg swelling redness warmth or pain suggestive of DVT without breathing problems
notes: Isolated limb DVT signs without systemic compromise

symptom: known infection getting worse with confusion shortness of breath or high fever sepsis
allergic reaction with throat face lip tongue swelling wheezing breathing difficulty anaphylaxis
